data.title: As a developer, I verify that extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins triggers DSO plugin consent on first Claude Code launch
data.description:
Spike / Research Story — exempt from T1 gate. Produces a decision document that unblocks S2 and S5.

Done Definition:
- Research documents the exact .claude/settings.json structure combining extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins that triggers the DSO plugin consent dialog on claude launch
- Success path: exact settings.json JSON snippet confirmed to trigger consent dialog committed to plugins/dso/docs/designs/dso-nextjs-starter-plugin-install.md
- Failure path: if consent dialog does NOT trigger automatically, documents the exact 'claude plugin install <url>' command the installer must call in S5 as fallback, with evidence (e.g., GitHub issue reference, observed behavior)
- Research document explicitly states which path was confirmed and is authoritative for S2 (settings.json conditional) and S5 (plugin install step conditional)

Considerations:
- extraKnownMarketplaces alone does not trigger consent (known behavior per anthropics/claude-code#32607); the combined extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins approach is the hypothesis to verify
- If real Claude Code CLI is available, test the consent flow against a throwaway settings.json; otherwise rely on confirmed GitHub issue evidence

Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked
